subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up from the conference — glad you reached out to get something formal on the calendar.

A 30-minute call next week sounds perfect. Here are a few slots that work on our end:
- Monday, 3:00–3:30 PM UTC
- Tuesday, 10:00–10:30 AM UTC
- Thursday, 2:00–2:30 PM UTC

Let me know which works best for you, or suggest alternatives if needed.

On your request for the direct contact details of our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information externally. If the conversation develops and a senior-level technical discussion is the right next step, I'd be glad to facilitate a proper introduction through the appropriate channels.

Looking forward to the call!

Best regards
